description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building enclosed by a wooden fence, featuring a modern flat-roofed design. The property includes a main structure with a rooftop terrace, several tall coniferous trees arranged in a row, and three garage-like outbuildings with curved roofs. The yard is divided into paved and landscaped areas, with a small pool or water feature visible in one corner. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with wooden accents on the fence and outbuildings. The overall layout is organized and spacious, with clear separation between the living area, garages, and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a fenced yard, rooftop terrace, three garages, and landscaped areas with trees and a pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the side, highlighting the fenced perimeter, main building, and a row of trees along with the garages and paved yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the bungalow, emphasizing the three garage doors, the main entrance, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the property, showing the back of the main building, the garages, and a single tree in the yard.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, revealing the pool or water feature, the row of trees, and the relationship between the main building and the garages.
